landing_badge: A New Way to Learn Languages with AI
landing_hero_desc: Say goodbye to awkward practice. Guaji AI delivers natural, fluid voice conversations to help you build real speaking confidence.
landing_features_desc: Powered by cutting-edge AI voice technology for an immersive speaking practice experience
feature_1_desc: Your AI tutor listens, understands, and responds instantly to simulate real conversations
feature_2_desc: Custom practice scenarios tailored to your level and interests
feature_3_desc: Practice anytime, anywhere — no scheduling required
feature_4_desc: Detailed learning reports so you can see every step of improvement
landing_testimonials_desc: Thousands of learners have already improved their speaking with Guaji AI
t1_text: After one month with Guaji AI, my IELTS speaking score jumped from 5.5 to 6.5!
t2_text: I finally have the confidence to speak up in English meetings. Thank you, AI tutor!
t3_text: No more language barriers on trips abroad. The practice scenarios are so practical!
landing_pricing_desc: Choose the plan that fits you and start your speaking journey
landing_cta_desc: Sign up now and start your AI speaking practice journey
